mapper.insert: insert into polyp_detect_task (task_no, patient_id, source_file_id, model_id, status, conf_threshold, result_id, inference_ms, error_msg, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskNo}, #{patientId}, #{sourceFileId}, #{modelId}, #{status}, #{confThreshold}, #{resultId}, #{inferenceMs}, #{errorMsg}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select task_id, task_no, patient_id, source_file_id, model_id, status, conf_threshold, result_id, inference_ms, error_msg, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from polyp_detect_task where task_id = #{taskId}

select t.task_id, t.task_no, t.patient_id, t.source_file_id, t.model_id, t.status, t.conf_threshold, t.result_id, t.inference_ms, t.error_msg, t.start_time, t.finish_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, case when lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv') then 'video' else 'image' end as media_type, ifnull(r.polyp_count, 0) as polyp_count from polyp_detect_task t left join file_asset f on f.file_id = t.source_file_id left join his_detection_result r on r.result_id = t.result_id
and t.status != 'DELETED' and t.task_no like concat('%', #{taskNo}, '%') and t.patient_id = #{patientId} and t.model_id = #{modelId} and t.status = #{status}
and lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv')
and lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) not in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv')
and t.create_time >= concat(#{params.beginTime}, ' 00:00:00')
and t.create_time <= concat(#{params.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
order by t.task_id desc

select t.task_id as taskId, t.task_no as taskNo, t.status as status, t.inference_ms as inferenceMs, t.create_time as createTime, t.remark as remark, case when lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv') then 'video' else 'image' end as mediaType, ifnull(r.polyp_count, 0) as polypCount from polyp_detect_task t left join file_asset f on f.file_id = t.source_file_id left join his_detection_result r on r.result_id = t.result_id
and t.status != 'DELETED' and t.task_no like concat('%', #{taskNo}, '%') and t.patient_id = #{patientId} and t.model_id = #{modelId} and t.status = #{status}
and lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv')
and lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) not in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv')
and t.create_time >= concat(#{params.beginTime}, ' 00:00:00')
and t.create_time <= concat(#{params.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
order by t.task_id desc

select (select count(1) from polyp_detect_task where status != 'DELETED') as totalTaskCount, (select count(1) from polyp_detect_task where status != 'DELETED' and date(create_time) = curdate()) as todayTaskCount, (select count(1) from polyp_detect_task where status = 'SUCCESS' and status != 'DELETED') as successTaskCount, (select count(1) from polyp_detect_task where status = 'FAILED' and status != 'DELETED') as failedTaskCount, (select ifnull(round(avg(inference_ms), 2), 0) from polyp_detect_task where status = 'SUCCESS' and status != 'DELETED' and inference_ms is not null) as avgInferenceMs, (select ifnull(sum(r.polyp_count), 0) from his_detection_result r join polyp_detect_task t on t.result_id = r.result_id where t.status != 'DELETED') as totalPolypCount

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as taskCount from polyp_detect_task where status != 'DELETED' and create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by statDate asc

select media_type as mediaType, count(1) as taskCount from ( select case when lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv') then 'video' else 'image' end as media_type from polyp_detect_task t left join file_asset f on f.file_id = t.source_file_id where t.status != 'DELETED' ) a group by media_type
select status, count(1) as taskCount from polyp_detect_task where status != 'DELETED' group by status

select t.task_id as taskId, t.task_no as taskNo, t.status as status, t.inference_ms as inferenceMs, t.create_time as createTime, case when lower(ifnull(f.ext_name, '')) in ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'mkv') then 'video' else 'image' end as mediaType, f.origin_name as originName from polyp_detect_task t left join file_asset f on f.file_id = t.source_file_id where t.status != 'DELETED' order by t.task_id desc limit #{limit}
